---
title: "Take-Home Exercises"
---

# Take-Home Exercise

This section contains the take-home exercises completed for the module.

::: {.card-grid}
::: {.info-card}
### Exercise 1

[View Exercise 1](take-home/exercise1.html)
:::

::: {.info-card}
### Exercise 2

[View Exercise 2](take-home/exercise2.html)
:::
:::
